message: Amber Fort is shut for a state ceremony. Your guided tour is cancelled and refunded.
A fuel surcharge landed. The two day private cab has been repriced.
The Nahargarh approach road is closed for repairs. The sunset viewpoint is off.
A wedding party has filled the city. Hotel Pearl Palace repriced your room.
Chokhi Dhani is fully booked tonight. Your table has been released.
The balloon operator has released last minute seats at a lower fare.
A cricket match weekend has cleared out the Shatabdi. The only seats left are premium.
Hawa Mahal and Jantar Mantar are shut for a heritage survey. Your Day 2 morning walk is cancelled and refunded.
A literature festival has taken the city. Hotel Pearl Palace has moved your room onto festival rates.
